company.name: Anthropic
company.notes: Sponsors. Frontier lab. Has creative-AI surfaces.

research.status_summary: Actively and aggressively hiring with 367–416 open roles across research, engineering, product, and sales — zero layoffs in 2026, headcount has tripled since 2023, and the company filed confidentially for a U.S. IPO on June 1, 2026.
research.hiring_policy: Anthropic confirms visa sponsorship (H-1B, H-1B1, E-3) and green card support for eligible full-time roles, retaining an immigration lawyer; the company is office-first (SF HQ with NYC, Seattle, London, Dublin, and new EU offices), expecting staff in-office at least 25% of the time, with only ~7–8% of open roles listed as remote-friendly — no EOR/fully-remote-from-abroad option exists.
recent_news: June 1 2026: Anthropic confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC for a U.S. IPO, targeting a public debut as early as fall 2026 at a ~$1 trillion valuation.

May 28 2026: Closed a $65B Series H led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia at a $965B post-money valuation — surpassing OpenAI as the most valuable AI startup; total funding since 2021 now ~$125B.

May 2026: Launched Claude Design (a creative visual-work product via Anthropic Labs), released Claude Opus 4.8, previewed Claude Mythos (advanced cybersecurity model), and hired Andrej Karpathy onto the pre-training team; also opened a Milan office and announced Paris/Munich expansion.
Run-rate revenue hit $47B as of late May 2026 (up from $30B earlier in the year), driven heavily by Claude Code which had reached $2.5B run-rate by February 2026.
Anthropic is currently in a legal battle with the U.S. government after the Pentagon designated it a supply-chain risk, which the company says could jeopardize billions in revenue.
research.growth_signal: Explosive hypergrowth trajectory: headcount ~3,000–5,000 (up from ~800 in early 2024), revenue run-rate at $47B and accelerating, valuation nearly tripled in three months from $380B to $965B, with an IPO on deck for fall 2026.
research.fit_for_lior: Anthropic is a top-tier fit across all three of Lior's threads — Claude Design and Claude.ai are live creative-AI surfaces, Claude Code is the dominant vibe-coding/agentic-coding product in the market, and the company is actively hiring product-adjacent roles (UX research, product comms, data science) where a Creative AI Product Analyst skill set maps directly.
